datasheet.text: While this model is leading a unit, WRAITH CONSTRUCT models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.
datasheet.name: Way of the Shaper (Psychic)

datasheet.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly WRAITH CONSTRUCT or ASURYANI VEHICLE units, unless it is leading a unit, this model has the Lone Operative ability.
datasheet.name: Bonesinger

datasheet.text: In your Command phase , you can select one friendly WRAITH CONSTRUCT or ASURYANI VEHICLE model within 3" of this model. That WRAITH CONSTRUCT or ASURYANI VEHICLE model regains up to D3 lost wounds.
datasheet.name: Psytronome Shaper
